titleStmt.title: SII 36.128: original edition by P Shanmugam
No. 128. (A.R. No. 128 of 1910.) TEṈKARAI, NILAKKOTTAI TALUK, MADURA DISTRICT. On the north wall of the first prākāra in the Mūlasthānēśvara temple.

summary.p: Built in and incomplete. The inscription commences with the praśasti of the king and stops with the mention of name, Chaḍaiyapaṉmar.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . pūviṉkiḻatti mevi vīṟṟiruppa metiṉi mātu nītiyiṟ puṇara vayap por maṭantai jayaBuilt in at the end.
lai maṭantai vākkiṉil viḷaṅkat ticaiyirunāṉku micainilā veṟippa maṟaineṟi vaḷar maṉuneṟi tikaḻaBuilt in at the end.
ṟun taḻaippa kāṉaveṅkaiyai villuṭaṉṟurantu mīṉaḷaṅ kaṉakācaṉattu vīṟṟiruppa Eṇkiri cūḻnta EḻukaBuilt in at the end.
l veṇkuṭai niḻaṟṟac ceṅkol naṭappa koṭuṅkali naṭuṅki neṭumpilat toḷippa villavar cempiyar virāṭaBuilt in at the end.
tiṟaiyuṭaṉ muṟaimuṟai paṇiya Iru nemiyaḷavu moru nemiyoṅka Iṉṉamutākiya Iyalicai nāṭaka maṉṉiBuilt in at the end.
viḷaṅkiya katiroḷi virasimhāsanattu vīṟṟiruntaruḷiya śrī koccaṭaiyapaṉmarāṉa tribhuvaṉac cakkaravattikaBuilt in at the end.
Digital edition of SII 36.128 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
